qwen35-4b.name: Qwen3.5 4B
qwen35-4b.description: Alibaba's fast 4-billion-parameter chat model. Fits in 4 GB VRAM — ideal for laptops.

qwen35-9b.name: Qwen3.5 9B
qwen35-9b.description: The sweet-spot 9B model — much smarter than 4B with only ~2× more memory.

qwen251-coder-7b-instruct.name: Qwen2.5.1 Coder 7B Instruct
qwen251-coder-7b-instruct.description: Coding-specialized Qwen2.5.1 model tuned for instruction-following and software tasks.

qwen35-27b.name: Qwen3.5 27B
qwen35-27b.description: Flagship 27B chat + reasoning model. Best Qwen quality; needs ≥ 16 GB VRAM for Q4.

qwen35-27b-claude-opus-distilled.name: Qwen3.5 27B Claude Opus Distilled
qwen35-27b-claude-opus-distilled.description: Qwen3.5-27B fine-tuned with Claude 4.6 Opus reasoning distillation. Enhanced reasoning capabilities; needs ≥ 16 GB VRAM for Q4.

gpt-oss-20b.name: GPT-OSS 20B
gpt-oss-20b.description: Meta's 20B open-source model. Strong multilingual reasoning; needs 16 GB VRAM for Q4.

qwen3-coder-next.name: Qwen3 Coder Next
qwen3-coder-next.description: Alibaba's next-generation coding model. Trained on trillions of code tokens; excels at multi-file projects.

qwen3-vl-30b.name: Qwen3 VL 30B
qwen3-vl-30b.description: Vision-Language MoE model — 30B total / 3B active parameters. Understands images, charts, and documents.

ministral-14b-instruct.name: Ministral 3 14B Instruct
ministral-14b-instruct.description: Mistral's efficient 14B instruction model trained to January 2025. Fast inference with long 128K context.

ministral-14b-reasoning.name: Ministral 3 14B Reasoning
ministral-14b-reasoning.description: Reasoning-tuned variant of Ministral 14B. Better at math, logic, and structured thinking.

gemma3-270m.name: Gemma 3 270M
gemma3-270m.description: Google's tiny 270M instruction model. Runs anywhere — CPU, Raspberry Pi, mobile. Great for simple tasks.

phi4-reasoning-plus.name: Phi-4 Reasoning Plus
phi4-reasoning-plus.description: Microsoft's Phi-4 fine-tuned for reasoning. Punches above its weight at math and science.

omnicoder-9b.name: OmniCoder 9B
omnicoder-9b.description: Tesslate's 9-billion-parameter coding-focused model. Strong code generation and understanding; fits in 8 GB VRAM at Q4.

qwen35-4b-hauhau-aggressive.name: Qwen3.5 4B Uncensored (HauhauCS Aggressive)
qwen35-4b-hauhau-aggressive.description: Uncensored aggressive fine-tune of Qwen3.5 4B by HauhauCS. No content filters — use responsibly.

qwen35-9b-hauhau-aggressive.name: Qwen3.5 9B Uncensored (HauhauCS Aggressive)
qwen35-9b-hauhau-aggressive.description: Uncensored aggressive fine-tune of Qwen3.5 9B by HauhauCS. No content filters — use responsibly.

qwen35-27b-hauhau-aggressive.name: Qwen3.5 27B Uncensored (HauhauCS Aggressive)
qwen35-27b-hauhau-aggressive.description: Uncensored aggressive fine-tune of Qwen3.5 27B by HauhauCS. No content filters — use responsibly.

qwen35-35b-a3b-hauhau-aggressive.name: Qwen3.5 35B-A3B Uncensored (HauhauCS Aggressive)
qwen35-35b-a3b-hauhau-aggressive.description: Uncensored aggressive fine-tune of Qwen3.5 35B-A3B (MoE) by HauhauCS. 35B total / 3B active params — fast inference despite large size. No content filters — use responsibly.

qwen3-30b-a3b-instruct.name: Qwen3 30B-A3B Instruct
qwen3-30b-a3b-instruct.description: Qwen3 MoE model — 30B total / 3B active parameters. Fast inference with strong reasoning. MoE architecture provides high quality at low active compute cost.

lfm25-vl-1.6b.name: LFM2.5-VL 1.6B
lfm25-vl-1.6b.description: Liquid Foundation Model 2.5 Vision-Language — 1.6B-parameter multimodal model from LiquidAI. Ultra-compact vision+language model with image understanding. Fits in <2 GB VRAM.

lfm25-1.2b-instruct.name: LFM2.5 1.2B Instruct
lfm25-1.2b-instruct.description: Liquid Foundation Model 2.5 Instruct — 1.2B-parameter text model from LiquidAI. Ultra-compact and fast, fits in <2 GB VRAM — ideal for constrained devices.

lfm25-1.2b-thinking.name: LFM2.5 1.2B Thinking
lfm25-1.2b-thinking.description: Liquid Foundation Model 2.5 Thinking — 1.2B-parameter reasoning model from LiquidAI. Chain-of-thought capable, ultra-compact. Fits in <2 GB VRAM.

minimax-m25.name: MiniMax M2.5
minimax-m25.description: MiniMax's 456B Mixture-of-Experts model (46B active). Top-tier reasoning and chat quality. Requires high-end hardware (64 GB+ unified memory or VRAM).

models.description: Recommended — default size for most coding tasks
Fits 16 GB VRAM; lower code accuracy
Recommended — 24 GB VRAM for full GPU
Ultra-small — lowest quality, fits 16 GB VRAM
Good balance of quality and size
Ultra-low 1-bit (single file) — lowest quality, smallest download
Ultra-low 1-bit imatrix — very lossy but compact
Ultra-low 1-bit imatrix medium — slightly better than IQ1_S
3-bit small — good balance for 128 GB systems
3-bit medium — better quality, needs 128 GB+ memory
Recommended — best quality/size tradeoff, needs 160 GB+ memory
5-bit medium — high quality, needs 192 GB+ memory
